LanguageData.TW_Mech_Praetor.label: Gestate Praetor
LanguageData.TW_Mech_Praetor.description: An upgraded mechanoid featuring enhanced shield generators and a quad-guided missile launcher system. Capable of launching precision HE or EMP warheads at extended ranges to suppress targets. Rear-mounted counter-detection radar neutralizes cloaking effects of all hostile units within operational radius.
